path: Problem: Populate a 2D output grid by intersecting a row label and a column header, filtered by a selected entity, and copy across/down reliably
Action: INDEX with two MATCH functions plus a horizontal offset using COLUMNS; wrap with IFERROR; apply rounding/number formatting separately as needed

Observation: Using MATCH to find the entity’s starting column and adding a COLUMNS-based offset makes the formula fill correctly across multiple output columns even when source layout is wide; merged cells in the source can be bypassed by referencing the underlying full data range
